title: StringDispatch
description: Attempts to bring back the string dupe glitch pre-21.2. NeoForge only for now
body:
This attempts to restore back MC-129055, allowing string dupers via tripwire hooks to work again.

Mainly made this out of frustration since I found out the modloader used for the pack I play on decided to patch this out themselves, so I'm just bringing this back in.

![21.1 known string duper in action, with oak log setup, lever switched to disable trapdoors, and water flowing, causing the string to constantly attach, and reattach, duping the string.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3635a30330b7cca9601135cab3441513865e4ebd.png)
